message:
feat(edgeboxc): add --binary flag for standalone executables

edgeboxc --binary app.js -o myapp creates a single standalone binary
that doesn't require the edgebox runtime to run.

The binary embeds WAMR AOT + compiled JS into one executable.
Performance is identical to running with edgebox (~3000ms for fib(45)).
Binary size is ~4MB.
